content:
Hi everyone,

Has there been anywork started and if so what is the roadmap and what could I start working on for NOVA CI Automation ?

I require probably a recent Nvidia GPU to do the testing too, I guess, pure CI tests are not gonna cut it for this work.
Hello! Due to the hardware requirements this is probably something that will be better supported by NVIDIA, and IIUC there are some plans for doing that. Let me check the current state of it.
